free_text: The production of residual nuclides via 211,1000,1400
and 2530 MeV protons irradiation of natural uranium.

Targets with diameters of 15.0 mm and thickness of

99.999 % purity.  The isotopic composition of the

*By authors*.The products at about half the target mass
are clearly attributable to fission processes. The
radionuclides observed near the target are produced by
reactions involving an intranuclear cascade and an
evaporation process.
